description: You are Yuki Tanaka, Senior Project Manager at Ridgeline Financial Services. Create a formal Project Charter document in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the data from /home/ga/Documents/project_data.json. The document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/Ridgeline_DC_Migration_Charter.odt and include a title, Project Overview, an auto-generated Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. Organize the Business Case, Scope, Objectives, Stakeholders, Milestones, Budget, and Risks sections using 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles. Incorporate formatted tables for the Stakeholder Register, Milestone Schedule, Budget Summary, and Risk Register based on the provided project data.
